script: APP=b1d02264-28fe-49f1-ae71-b50b6809f852; TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; MESSY=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "messy-len=${#MESSY}"; CLEAN=$(printf '%s' "$MESSY" | tail -n 1); echo "clean-len=${#CLEAN}"; echo -n 'clean-first-5: '; printf '%s' "$CLEAN" | head -c 5; echo; echo; echo '===== TEST candidate clean secret BEFORE writing back =====' && RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$CLEAN" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); echo "$RESP" | jq '{has_token: (.access_token != null), expires_in, error}' 2>&1; HAS=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print("yes" if json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token") else "no")'); echo "has_token=$HAS"; echo; if [ "$HAS" = "yes" ]; then echo '===== Writing clean value back to vault =====' && printf '%s' "$CLEAN" | az keyvault secret set --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --file /dev/stdin -o none && echo 'vault updated'; echo '===== Verify post-write =====' && NEW=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "new-len=${#NEW}"; echo; echo '===== Restart Emily services =====' && sudo systemctl restart emily-claude-bot.service emily-claude-responder.service 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; systemctl is-active emily-claude-bot.service emily-claude-responder.service; else echo 'Clean candidate did not authenticate — NOT updating vault. Need to investigate further.'; fi
